mapper.select: SELECT o.*, u.nickname as user_name, oi.id as item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.product_name, oi.product_image, oi.price as item_price, oi.quantity as item_quantity, oi.total_price as item_total_price FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.id = #{id}
